user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Quick Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Quick continental-style breakfast at the hotel (lobby buffet or grab-and-go) to fuel you before your 9:00 AM meeting.

insertion_point.reasoning: User's meeting is at 9:00 AM and Day 2 currently starts at 11:00 AM; inserting a quick hotel breakfast at 8:00-8:30 AM at position 0 ensures it's before the meeting and before other activities.
